body:
I believe the [Physics/Turbulence Closures](https://clima.github.io/OceananigansDocumentation/stable/physics/turbulence_closures/) section of docs had a minor inconsistency caused by a minus sign.

Also (I haven't changed this yet because I haven't had the time to check in the code) I believe there might be a factor of 2 missing from the τ_ij equation (not numbered), which is the first Eq in [this subsection](https://clima.github.io/OceananigansDocumentation/stable/physics/turbulence_closures/#Smagorinsky-Lilly-turbulence-closure)). 

Other pairs of eyes here would be appreciated, but if not I'll double check everything at a later date.
title: Small adjustment to Turbulence Closures section of docs
